title: zanthoxylum macrophyllum
intro: Zanthoxylum macrophyllum, also known as the large-leaved prickly ash, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum macrophyllum include relief from pain, fever reduction, and improved digestion, making it a valuable herb for addressing various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum macrophyllum typically involve the root bark, which can be dried and made into teas, tinctures, or capsules for consumption.
